title: spilanthes pseudoacmella
intro: Spilanthes pseudoacmella, also known as Acmella oleracea, is an annual herb native to Central and South America, known for its unique property of producing a temporary numbing sensation on the tongue and mouth when consumed. The plant is rich in spilanthol, a sesquiterpene that exhibits anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Spilanthes pseudoacmella include reducing inflammation and pain, treating oral infections and gum disease, and potentially aiding in weight loss. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine and as a culinary ingredient to add flavor and heat to dishes.
